title: Nursery Rhyme. DVIII. Natural History.
content:
As I went over the water,
        The water went over me.
        I saw two little blackbirds sitting on a tree:
        The one called me a rascal,
        The other called me a thief;
        I took up my little black stick,
        And knocked out all their teeth.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DVIII. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
